title: arenaria littoralis
intro: Arenaria littoralis, also known as sea spurry, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the pink family of plants. The medicinal properties of Arenaria littoralis include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of sea spurry include its potential to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as its anti-inflammatory properties that may help with joint pain and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Arenaria littoralis can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues.
